full_text:
Lady Du 杜夫人
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Du (杜夫人). Married to Qin Yilu. Guan Yu wished to marry her but Cao Cao took her instead. Lady Du was affiliated with Lu Bu and the Wei Kingdom.
